{{short description|Adult entertainment industry award}}
{{Use mdy dates|date=June 2023}}
{{Infobox award
| name = [[AVN Award]] for Female Performer of the Year
| image = 
| image_size = 
| alt = 
| caption = 
| awarded_for = Female Performer of the Year
| presenter = [[AVN Media Network]]
| country = [[United States]]
| firstawarded = {{start date and age|1993}}
| lastawarded = 
| holder = [[Jennifer White (pornographic film actress)|Jennifer White]]
| website = {{URL|https://avn.com/awards}}
}}
The '''AVN Award for Female Performer of the Year''' is presented every January in [[Las Vegas, Nevada]] at the [[AVN Awards]] ceremony sponsored and presented by the American adult video industry trade magazine ''[[Adult Video News]]'' (AVN). It represents the female [[Pornographic film actor|porn star]] who has had the best body of work in the previous year. It has been given annually since 1993.

[[Tori Black]] was the first two-time winner, winning back-to-back in 2010 and 2011.<ref name=ToriBlack10>{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Tori-Black-It-Takes-a-Village-382201.html|title=Tori Black: 'It Takes a Village'|access-date=August 8, 2014|author=Dan Miller|date=January 26, 2010|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|archive-date=January 25, 2016|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160125165211/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Tori-Black-It-Takes-a-Village-382201.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref name=ToriBlack11>{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Interview-With-the-Phenom-Tori-Black-429002.html|title=Interview With the Phenom: Tori Black|access-date=August 8, 2014|author=Peter Warren|date=March 22, 2011|magazine=AVN|archive-date=December 22, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151222140212/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Interview-With-the-Phenom-Tori-Black-429002.html|url-status=dead}}</ref> [[Angela White]] was the first three-time winner, winning back-to-back-to-back in 2018, 2019 and 2020.<ref>{{Cite news|last=Snow|first=Aurora|date=February 1, 2020|title=Meet the Meryl Streep of Porn|language=en|work=The Daily Beast|url=https://www.thedailybeast.com/meet-the-meryl-streep-of-porn|access-date=November 22, 2020}}</ref> [[Kira Noir]] became the first black woman to win the award in 2023.<ref>{{cite news |first=Dan |last=Miller |title=2023 AVN Awards Show Dazzles in Return to Las Vegas AVN |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2023-avn-awards-wrap-up-story-914766.html |access-date=February 1, 2023 |work=AVN}}</ref>

==Winners and nominees==
===1990s===
{| class="wikitable sortable"
|-
! Year !! Photo !! Winner !! Nominees
|-
|1993|| [[File:Ashlyn gere adjusted.jpg|160px]] ||[[Ashlyn Gere]]<ref name="ashlyngere" /> ||
|-
|1994<ref name="Program">{{cite magazine |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |title=The 1994 AVN Awards Show |magazine=Official Program |location=Upper Darby, Pennsylvania |publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |date=January 8, 1994 }}</ref>||  ||[[Debi Diamond]]<ref name="debidiamond" /> || <small>Rebecca Bardoux<br>Celeste<br>[[Ashlyn Gere]]<br>[[Shayla LaVeaux]]<br>Leena<br>[[Tiffany Mynx]]<br>[[P. J. Sparxx]]<br>Crystal Wilder<br>[[Ona Zee]]</small>
|-
|1995<ref>{{cite AV media|title= Adult Video News Awards 1995|publisher= [[VCA Pictures]]}}</ref>|| [[File:Carrera Asia.jpg|160px]] || [[Asia Carrera]]<ref name="asiacarrera" /> ||<small>Tammi Ann<br>Ariana<br>[[Kaitlyn Ashley]]<br>[[Misty Rain]]<br>[[Shane (actress)|Shane]]<br>[[Ashlyn Gere]]<ref name="Oui-1995">{{cite magazine |last=Roark |first=Howard |title=Porn Invades Sin City|magazine=Oui |location=New York, New York|publisher=Laurent Publishing, Ltd. |date=May 1995 |volume=26 |issue=5 |pages=20–30 }}</ref><br>Sarah Jane Hamilton<ref name="Oui-1995" /><br>[[Kylie Ireland]]<ref name="Oui-1995" /><br>Leena<ref name="Oui-1995" /><br>[[Tiffany Million|Tyffany Million]]<ref name="Oui-1995" /><br>[[Brittany O'Connell]]<ref name="Oui-1995" /></small>
|-
|13th AVN Awards|1996<ref name="VCA-VHS">{{cite AV media |people=Stone, Mark (Director) |year=1996 |title=The 1996 AVN Awards |medium=videotape |publisher=[[VCA Pictures]] }}</ref> || [[File:Kaitlyn Ashley.jpg|160px]] || [[Kaitlyn Ashley]]<ref name="kaitlynashley" /> || <small>Tammi Ann<br>[[Juli Ashton]]<br>Celeste<br>[[Careena Collins]]<br>[[Jeanna Fine]]<br>Tera Heart<br>[[Melissa Hill]]<br>[[Jenna Jameson]]<br>Lana Sands<br>[[Nici Sterling]]</small>
|-
|[[14th AVN Awards|1997]]<ref>{{cite AV media |people=Stone, Mark (Director) |year=1997 |title=1997 AVN Awards |medium=videotape |publisher=[[VCA Pictures]] }}</ref>|| [[File:Missy PS 1999.jpg|160px]] || Missy<ref name="missy" /> || <small>[[Juli Ashton]]<br>Alex Dane<br>[[Jeanna Fine]]<br>[[Melissa Hill]]<br>[[Jenna Jameson]]<br>[[Jill Kelly (actress)|Jill Kelly]]<br>[[Christi Lake]]<br>[[Shayla LaVeaux]]<br>[[Caressa Savage]]<br>[[Nici Sterling]]<br>[[Nikki Tyler]]</small>
|-
|[[15th AVN Awards|1998]]<ref>{{cite journal|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|title=History|journal=1998 AVN Awards Show Program|location=Van Nuys, CA|publisher=AVN Publications, Inc.|date=January 9, 1998}}</ref>|| [[File:Stephanie Swift at Sexxxpose Party 1.jpg|160px]] ||Stephanie Swift<ref name="stephanieswift" /> || <small> Chloe<br>[[Jill Kelly (actress)|Jill Kelly]]<br>[[Christi Lake]]<br>[[Dyanna Lauren]]<br>[[Shanna McCullough]]<br>Mila<br>Missy<br>[[Tiffany Mynx]]<br>Julie Rage<br>[[Jasmin St. Claire]]<br>[[Serenity (actress)|Serenity]]<br>[[Stacy Valentine]]</small>
|-
|[[16th AVN Awards|1999]]<ref>{{cite journal|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|title=Choices|journal=1999 AVN Awards Show Program|location=Van Nuys, CA|publisher=AVN Publications, Inc.|date=January 9, 1999}}</ref>|| [[File:Chloe 2002.png|160px]] || Chloe<ref name="chloe" /> || <small>Johnni Black<br>[[Asia Carrera]]<br>Roxanne Hall<br>[[Alisha Klass]]<br>[[Jill Kelly (actress)|Jill Kelly]]<br>[[Midori (actress)|Midori]]<br>Mocha<br>[[Tiffany Mynx]]<br>[[Silvia Saint]]<br>[[Serenity (actress)|Serenity]]<br>[[Stacy Valentine]]</small>
|}

===2000s===
{| class="wikitable sortable"
|-
! Year !! Photo !! Winner !! Nominees
|-
|[[17th AVN Awards|2000]]<ref name="avnnoms2000" />|| [[File:Inari Vachs iafd adjust.jpg|160px]] ||Inari Vachs<ref name="inarivachs" /> || <small>Chloe<br>Sabrina Johnson<br>[[Alisha Klass]]<br>Monique<br>[[Raylene]]<br>[[Serenity (actress)|Serenity]]<br>[[Alexandra Silk]]<br>Stephanie Swift</small>
|-
|[[18th AVN Awards|2001]]<ref name="avnnoms2001" />|| [[File:Jewel De'Nyle Las Vegas 2000.jpg|160px]] || [[Jewel De'Nyle]]<ref name="jeweldenyle" /> ||<small>Jessica Darlin<br>Dee<br>Bridgette Kerkove<br>Shelbee Myne<br>[[Kristi Myst]]<br>[[Alexandra Quinn]]<br>[[Serenity (actress)|Serenity]]<br>[[Sydnee Steele]]<br>Inari Vachs<br>Ava Vincent</small>
|-
|[[19th AVN Awards|2002]]<ref name="avnnoms2002" />|| [[File:Nikita Denise at a screening of Deep Throat 2.jpg|160px]] || Nikita Denise<ref name="nikitadenise" /> || <small>Chloe<br>[[Jewel De'Nyle]]<br>Bridgette Kerkove<br>Monique<br>Taylor St. Claire<br>[[Serenity (actress)|Serenity]]<br>[[Sydnee Steele]]<br>Ava Vincent</small>
|-
|[[20th AVN Awards|2003]]<ref name="avnnoms2003" />|| [[File:Aurora Snow 2011.jpg|160px]] || [[Aurora Snow]]<ref name="aurorasnow" /> || <small>April Flowers<br>[[Briana Banks]]<br>[[Belladonna (actress)|Belladonna]]<br>[[Calli Cox]]<br>Nikita Denise<br>[[Jewel De'Nyle]]<br>[[Jessica Drake]]<br>[[Devinn Lane]]<br>Jodie Moore<br>Obsession<br>Michele Raven<br>Olivia Saint<br>Nicole Sheridan<br>Taylor St. Claire<br>[[Sydnee Steele]]</small>
|-
|[[21st AVN Awards|2004]]<ref name="avnnoms2004" />|| [[File:Ashley Blue DSC 0124.JPG|160px]] || [[Ashley Blue]]<ref name="ashleyblue" /> || <small>[[Sunrise Adams]]<br>[[Belladonna (actress)|Belladonna]]<br>Jessica Darlin<br>Olivia Del Rio<br>[[Jewel De'Nyle]]<br>Bridgette Kerkove<br>[[Devinn Lane]]<br>Ashley Long<br>[[Carmen Luvana]]<br>[[Gina Lynn]]<br>Monique<br>Taylor Rain<br>[[Savanna Samson]]<br>[[Aurora Snow]]</small>
|-
|[[22nd AVN Awards|2005]]<ref name="avnnoms2005" />|| [[File:Lauren Phoenix at 2005 AEE Awards.jpg|160px]] ||Lauren Phoenix<ref name="laurenphoenix" /> || <small>[[Ashley Blue]]<br>Cindy Crawford<br>[[Cytherea (actress)|Cytherea]]<br>[[Jessica Drake]]<br>[[Ariana Jollee]]<br>Katja Kassin<br>Katrina Kraven<br>[[Gina Lynn]]<br>Julie Night<br>Jayna Oso<br>Taylor Rain<br>Alicia Rhodes<br>[[Savanna Samson]]<br>Venus</small>
|-
|[[23rd AVN Awards|2006]]<ref name="avnnoms2006" />|| [[File:AN Audrey Hollander 1.jpg|160px]] || [[Audrey Hollander]]<ref name="audreyhollander" /> || <small>Jada Fire<br>[[Nicki Hunter]]<br>Roxy Jezel<br>[[Ariana Jollee]]<br>Dillan Lauren<br>Melissa Lauren<br>Missy Monroe<br>Gia Paloma<br>Lauren Phoenix<br>Taylor Rain<br>Sandra Romain<br>Brittney Skye<br>Flower Tucci<br>Venus</small>
|-
|[[24th AVN Awards|2007]]<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/27/84/74/2784742007UpdatedNominations |title=AVN Awards 2007 Nominees |access-date=September 27, 2014 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20070423104247/http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/27/84/74/2784742007UpdatedNominations |archive-date=April 23, 2007 }}</ref>|| [[File:Hillary Scott at Porn Star Karaoke 3.jpg|160px]] || [[Hillary Scott (actress)|Hillary Scott]]<ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Hillary-Scott-Wins-Big-at-AVN-Awards-29599.html|title=Hillary Scott Wins Big at AVN Awards|access-date=September 27, 2014|author=David Sullivan|author2=Mike Albo|name-list-style=amp|date=January 16, 2007|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|archive-date=May 2, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150502222006/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Hillary-Scott-Wins-Big-at-AVN-Awards-29599.html|url-status=dead}}</ref> || <small>[[Belladonna (actress)|Belladonna]]<br>Jasmine Byrne<br>Jada Fire<br>[[Jenna Haze]]<br>Roxy Jezel<br>[[Kimberly Kane]]<br>Kinzie Kenner<br>[[Sunny Lane]]<br>[[Tory Lane]]<br>[[Shy Love]]<br>Marie Luv<br>Sandra Romain<br>Sativa Rose<br>Flower Tucci</small>
|-
|[[25th AVN Awards|2008]]<ref>{{cite news|title=The 2008 AVN Awards Nominations |url=http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2008Nominations.pdf |access-date=August 21, 2014 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20080227073556/http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2008Nominations.pdf |archive-date=February 27, 2008 }}</ref>|| [[File:Sasha Grey 2010.jpg|160px]] || [[Sasha Grey]]<ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Sasha-Grey-Named-Female-Performer-of-the-Year-28193.html|title=Sasha Grey Named Female Performer of the Year|access-date=August 21, 2014|author=Mark Kernes|date=January 14, 2008|magazine=AVN|archive-date=August 24, 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140824144208/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Sasha-Grey-Named-Female-Performer-of-the-Year-28193.html|url-status=dead}}</ref> || <small>[[Monique Alexander]]<br>Courtney Cummz<br>[[Stormy Daniels]]<br>Jada Fire<br>[[Jenna Haze]]<br>[[Jesse Jane]]<br>[[Sunny Lane]]<br>[[Rebeca Linares]]<br>Brianna Love<br>[[Kirsten Price (actress)|Kirsten Price]]<br>Amy Ried<br>[[Savanna Samson]]<br>Annette Schwarz<br>[[Hillary Scott (actress)|Hillary Scott]]</small>
|-
|[[26th AVN Awards|2009]]<ref>{{cite news|title=Nominations 2009 AVN Adult Movie Awards |url=http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2009_AVN_NOMINATIONS_11_25_08.pdf |access-date=August 18, 2014 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20090105164506/http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2009_AVN_NOMINATIONS_11_25_08.pdf |archive-date=January 5, 2009 }}</ref>|| [[File:Jenna Haze 2009.jpg|160px]] || [[Jenna Haze]]<ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-s-Female-Performer-of-the-Year-Jenna-Haze-56629.html|title=AVN's Female Performer of the Year: Jenna Haze|access-date=August 18, 2014|author=Mark Kernes|date=January 16, 2009|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|archive-date=September 11, 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140911141658/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-s-Female-Performer-of-the-Year-Jenna-Haze-56629.html|url-status=dead}}</ref> || <small>[[Belladonna (actress)|Belladonna]]<br>Ashlynn Brooke<br>Roxy DeVille<br>[[Jessica Drake]]<br>[[Sasha Grey]]<br>Jenny Hendrix<br>[[Jesse Jane]]<br>[[Kayden Kross]]<br>[[Sunny Lane]]<br>[[Sunny Leone]]<br>[[Rebeca Linares]]<br>Marie Luv<br>Gianna Michaels<br>[[Bobbi Starr]]<br>[[Alexis Texas]]</small>
|}

===2010s===
{| class="wikitable sortable"
|-
! Year !! Photo !! Winner !! Nominees
|-
|[[27th AVN Awards|2010]]<ref>{{cite news|title=2010 Nominees |url=http://avnawards.avn.com/nominees/ |access-date=August 8, 2014 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20100304153045/http://avnawards.avn.com/nominees/ |archive-date=March 4, 2010 }}</ref>||rowspan=2|[[File:Tori Black 2014.jpg|160px]] ||rowspan=2|[[Tori Black]]<ref name=ToriBlack10/><ref name=ToriBlack11/> || <small>[[Belladonna (actress)|Belladonna]]<br>Lexi Belle<br>Ashlynn Brooke<br>[[Dana DeArmond]]<br>Chayse Evans<br>[[Jenna Haze]]<br>[[Kayden Kross]]<br>[[Jesse Jane]]<br>[[Amber Rayne]]<br>Nikki Rhodes<br>Ann Marie Rios<br>Kristina Rose<br>[[Bobbi Starr]]<br>[[Misty Stone]]</small>
|-
|[[28th AVN Awards|2011]]<ref>[https://web.archive.org/web/20130329112839/http://avnawards.avn.com/2011_nominations2.pdf Nominations for the 2011 AVN Awards]. Retrieved August 8, 2014</ref>|| <small>[[Asa Akira]]<br>[[Monique Alexander]]<br>Lexi Belle<br>[[Jenna Haze]]<br>[[Kagney Linn Karter]]<br>[[Kimberly Kane]]<br>[[Kayden Kross]]<br>Faye Reagan<br>Kristina Rose<br>Andy San Dimas<br>[[Bobbi Starr]]<br>[[Riley Steele]]<br>[[Misty Stone]]<br>[[Alexis Texas]]</small>
|-
|[[29th AVN Awards|2012]]<ref>[https://web.archive.org/web/20130329124455/http://avnawards.avn.com/2012_AVN_Awards_nominations.pdf AVN Awards 2012 – Nominations]. Retrieved August 6, 2014</ref> ||[[File:Bobbi Starr 2009.jpg|160px]] ||[[Bobbi Starr]]<ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-2012-AVN-Award-Winners-461715.html|title=AVN Announces the 2012 AVN Award Winners|access-date=August 6, 2014|date=January 22, 2012|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|archive-date=May 13, 2016|archive-url=https://archive.today/20160513174915/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-2012-AVN-Award-Winners-461715.html|url-status=dead}}</ref> || <small>[[Asa Akira]]<br>Lexi Belle<br>[[Dana DeArmond]]<br>Gracie Glam<br>Allie Haze<br>[[Jesse Jane]]<br>[[Kagney Linn Karter]]<br>[[Kimberly Kane]]<br>[[Kayden Kross]]<br>Lily LaBeau<br>[[:es:Phoenix_Marie|Phoenix Marie]]<br>[[Chanel Preston]]<br>Kristina Rose<br>Andy San Dimas<br>[[Alexis Texas]]</small>
|-
|[[30th AVN Awards|2013]]<ref>{{cite web|title=2013 AVN Awards Nominees |url=http://avnawards.avn.com/2013_nominations.pdf |access-date=August 6, 2014 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130328092725/http://avnawards.avn.com/2013_nominations.pdf |archive-date=March 28, 2013 }}</ref> || [[File:Asa Akira 2 2014.jpg|160px]] ||[[Asa Akira]]<ref>{{cite news|url=http://www.huffingtonpost.com/2013/01/19/asa-akira_n_2471858.html |title=Asa Akira Proud To Be Nominated Porn Industry's 'Performer Of The Year' (NSFW)|access-date=August 6, 2014|date=January 19, 2013|work=[[HuffPost]]}}</ref> || <small>[[Jessie Andrews]]<br>[[Eva Angelina]]<br>Lexi Belle<br>Lily Carter<br>[[Dana DeArmond]]<br>[[Skin Diamond]]<br>Gracie Glam<br>Allie Haze<br>[[Kayden Kross]]<br>Lily LaBeau<br>Brooklyn Lee<br>[[Chanel Preston]]<br>Kristina Rose<br>Samantha Saint<br>Andy San Dimas<br>[[Bobbi Starr]]<br>Jada Stevens<br>[[Misty Stone]]<br>[[Alexis Texas]]</small>
|-
|[[31st AVN Awards|2014]]<ref>{{cite web|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/page/3 |title=2014 AVN Award Nominees |access-date=August 6, 2014 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140126094717/http://avnawards.avn.com/page/3 |archive-date=January 26, 2014 }}</ref> || [[File:Bonnie Rotten 2014.jpg|160px]] ||[[Bonnie Rotten]]<ref>{{cite magazine|url=https://www.vice.com/en/article/bonnie-rotten/ |title=Bonnie Rotten, The AVN Performer of the Year, Has Super Powers|access-date=August 6, 2014|author=Chris Nieratko|date=January 31, 2014|magazine=[[Vice (magazine)|Vice]]}}</ref> || <small>[[Asa Akira]]<br>Anikka Albrite<br>Bailey Blue<br>Dani Daniels<br>[[Dana DeArmond]]<br>[[Skin Diamond]]<br>Allie Haze<br>[[Remy LaCroix]]<br>Maddy O'Reilly<br>[[Chanel Preston]]<br>[[Riley Reid]]<br>Samantha Saint<br>Sheena Shaw<br>Jada Stevens</small>
|-
|[[32nd AVN Awards|2015]]<ref>{{cite web|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/4 |title=2015 AVN Award Nominees |access-date=November 21, 2014 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20141230202705/http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/4 |archive-date=December 30, 2014 }}</ref> || [[File:Anikka Albrite 2015.jpg|160px]] ||Anikka Albrite<ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2015-AVN-Awards-585973.html|title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2015 AVN Awards|access-date=January 25, 2015|date=January 24, 2015|magazine=AVN|archive-date=February 6, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150206165744/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2015-AVN-Awards-585973.html|url-status=dead}}</ref> ||<small>A.J. Applegate<br />[[Adriana Chechik]]<br />Dani Daniels<br />[[Skin Diamond]]<br />Veruca James<br />Zoey Monroe<br />Maddy O'Reilly<br />[[Chanel Preston]]<br />Romi Rain<br />[[Riley Reid]]<br />[[Bonnie Rotten]]<br />Dahlia Sky<br />Jada Stevens<br />Jodi Taylor</small>
|-
|[[33rd AVN Awards|2016]]<ref>{{cite web|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/8 |title=2016 AVN Award Nominations |access-date=November 20, 2015 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151120162020/http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/8 |archive-date=November 20, 2015 }}</ref>|| [[File:Riley Reid 2019 by Glenn Francis.jpg|160px]] ||[[Riley Reid]]<ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/winners|title=2016 AVN Awards Winners|access-date=January 24, 2016|date=January 24, 2016|magazine=AVN|archive-date=November 28, 2016|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20161128025847/http://avnawards.avn.com/winners/|url-status=dead}}</ref> ||<small>Anikka Albrite<br />[[August Ames]]<br />A.J. Applegate<br />Vicki Chase<br />[[Adriana Chechik]]<br />[[Carter Cruise]]<br />Dani Daniels<br />Aidra Fox<br />Keisha Grey<br />Jillian Janson<br />Eva Lovia<br />Maddy O'Reilly<br />Romi Rain<br />Kleio Valentien</small>
|-
|[[34th AVN Awards|2017]]<ref name="nominees">{{cite magazine|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees |title=AVN Awards 2017 Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=November 17, 2016|magazine=Adult Video News|access-date=July 12, 2017|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170113172207/https://avn.com/awards/nominees |archive-date=January 13, 2017}}</ref>|| [[File:Adriana Chechik 2016.jpg|160px]] ||[[Adriana Chechik]]<ref>{{cite web |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2017-avn-award-winners-announced-712151.html |title=2017 AVN Award Winners Announced |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=January 21, 2017 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 22, 2017}}</ref> ||<small>Anikka Albrite<br />[[August Ames]]<br />A.J. Applegate<br />Vicki Chase<br />[[Abella Danger]]<br />Aidra Fox<br />Keisha Grey<br />Chanell Heart<br />Katrina Jade<br />Jillian Janson<br />Sara Luvv<br />Megan Rain<br />[[Riley Reid]]<br />Veronica Rodriguez</small>
|-
|[[35th AVN Awards|2018]]<ref>{{cite web|url=http://prnoholic.com/awards|title=Awards |date=February 12, 2018|website=prnoholic.com|access-date=February 12, 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180213195201/http://prnoholic.com/awards|archive-date=February 13, 2018|url-status=dead}}</ref>||rowspan=2| [[File:Angela White 2019 by Glenn Francis.jpg|160px]] ||rowspan=2|[[Angela White]]<ref name="2018 winners">{{cite magazine |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2018-avn-award-winners-announced-759869.html |title=2018 AVN Award Winners Announced |date=January 28, 2018 |magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2019-avn-813648.html|title=2019 AVN Award Winners Announced|date=January 27, 2019 |magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>||<small>[[August Ames]]<br />[[Adriana Chechik]]<br />[[Abella Danger]]<br />Aidra Fox<br />Keisha Grey<br />Holly Hendrix<br />Katrina Jade<br />Elsa Jean<br />Eva Lovia<br />[[Riley Reid]]<br />[[Lana Rhoades]]<br />Jessa Rhodes<br />Natalia Starr<br />Gina Valentina<br /></small>
|-
|[[36th AVN Award|2019]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees|title=2019 Nominees AVN Awards|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=January 28, 2019}}</ref>
|| <small>[[Adriana Chechik]]<br />[[Abella Danger]]<br />Honey Gold<br /> Katrina Jade<br />Elsa Jean<br />Jill Kassidy<br />Abigail Mac<br />Ariana Marie<br />[[Kira Noir]]<br />[[Riley Reid]]<br />Kristen Scott<br />Kissa Sins<br />Gina Valentina<br />Whitney Wright<br /></small>
|}

===2020s===
{| class="wikitable sortable"
|-
! Year !! Photo !! Winner !! Nominees
|-
|[[37th AVN Awards|2020]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees|title=2020 Nominees AVN Awards|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=January 26, 2020}}</ref>|| [[File:Angela White 2019 by Glenn Francis.jpg|160px]] ||[[Angela White]]<ref name="AVN2020">{{cite web|url= https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2020-avn-award-winners-announced-863917.html|title=2020 AVN Award Winners Announced |date=January 25, 2020 |magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>|| <small>[[Adriana Chechik]]<br />[[Abella Danger]]<br />Joanna Angel<br />[[Ana Foxxx]]<br />Alina Lopez<br />Abigail Mac<br />[[Kira Noir]]<br />Kenzie Reeves<br />[[Riley Reid]]<br />Karma Rx<br />Kristen Scott<br />Jane Wilde<br />[[Emily Willis]]<br />Whitney Wright</small>
|-
|[[38th AVN Awards|2021]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2021_nominees|title=2021 Nominees AVN Awards|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=November 29, 2020}}</ref>|| [[File:Emily Willis on Holly Randall Unfiltered.jpg|160px]] ||[[Emily Willis]]<ref name="AVN2021">{{Cite web|last=AVN|first=AVN Staff|title=2021 AVN Award Winners Announced AVN|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2021-avn-award-winners-announced-895732.html|access-date=January 25, 2021|website=AVN}}</ref>|| <small>[[Adriana Chechik]]<br />[[Abella Danger]]<br />Gia Derza<br />[[Gianna Dior]]<br />[[Ana Foxxx]]<br />Emma Hix<br />Kenna James<br />Alina Lopez<br />[[Kira Noir]]<br />Kyler Quinn<br />Kenzie Reeves<br />Naomi Swann<br />[[Angela White]]<br />Jane Wilde</small>
|-
|[[39th AVN Awards|2022]]<ref>{{cite web | url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2022-avn-award-winners-announced-905527.html | title=2022 AVN Award Winners Announced AVN }}</ref>||[[File:Gianna Dior.jpg|160px]]||[[Gianna Dior]] ||<small>Aiden Ashley<br>[[Vanna Bardot]]<br>Lulu Chu<br>Avery Cristy<br>Gia Derza<br>Emma Hix<br>Kenna James<br>[[Kira Noir]]<br>Kenzie Reeves<br>[[Scarlit Scandal]]<br>Alexis Tae<br>[[Angela White]]<br>Jane Wilde<br>[[Emily Willis]]</small>
|-
|[[40th AVN Awards|2023]]<ref>{{cite web | url=https://avn.com/news/video/2023-avn-award-winners-announced-174557 | title=2023 AVN Award Winners Announced AVN }}</ref>|| [[File:Kira Noir, HRU 2022 03.jpg|160px]]|| [[Kira Noir]] ||<small>Aiden Ashley<br>[[Vanna Bardot]]<br>Lilly Bell<br>Blake Blossom<br>[[Savannah Bond]]<br>[[Anna Claire Clouds]]<br>[[Gianna Dior]]<br>[[Ana Foxxx]]<br>Kenna James<br>Maddy May<br>April Olsen<br>Alexis Tae<br>[[Angela White]]<br>Jane Wilde</small>
|-
|[[41st AVN Awards|2024]]<ref>{{cite web | url=https://avn.com/news/video/2024-avn-award-winners-announced-176800 | title=2024 AVN Award Winners Announced AVN }}</ref>|| [[File:Vanna Bardot.jpg|160px]]|| [[Vanna Bardot]]||<small>Lilly Bell<br>Blake Blossom<br>Lulu Chu<br>[[Anna Claire Clouds]]<br>Nicole Doshi<br>[[Ana Foxxx]]<br>Liz Jordan<br>Maddy May<br>[[Kira Noir]]<br>[[Kylie Rocket]]<br>Alexis Tae<br>[[Angela White]]<br>[[Jennifer White (pornographic film actress)|Jennifer White]]<br>Angel Youngs</small>
|-
|2025<ref>{{cite web | url=https://avn.com/news/video/2025-avn-award-winners-announced-178865 | title=2025 AVN Award Winners Announced AVN }}</ref>|| || [[Anna Claire Clouds]] ||<small>[[Vanna Bardot]]<br>Lilly Bell<br>Blake Blossom<br>[[Jewelz Blu]]<br>Chanel Camryn<br>Nicole Doshi<br>Liz Jordan<br>Cherry Kiss<br>[[Kira Noir]]<br>[[Octavia Red]]<br>Willow Ryder<br>[[Angela White]]<br>[[Jennifer White (pornographic film actress)|Jennifer White]]<br>Angel Youngs</small>
|-
|2026<ref>https://avn.com/awards/2026_nominees</ref>|| || [[Jennifer White (pornographic film actress)|Jennifer White]]<ref>https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971</ref> ||<small>Chloe Amour<br>[[Vanna Bardot]]<br>Lilly Bell<br>Blake Blossom<br>Chanel Camryn<br>[[Anna Claire Clouds]]<br>Liz Jordan<br>Cherry Kiss<br>Nicole Kitt<br>Rissa May<br>[[Octavia Red]]<br>Gal Ritchie<br>[[Kylie Rocket]]<br>[[Angela White]]</small>
|}

==Multiple wins and nominations==
{{col-begin}}

{{col-2}}

=== Multiple wins ===
{| class="wikitable sortable"
|-
! scope="col" width="55"     | Wins   
! scope="col" align="center" | Performer
! scope="col" width="100"     | Years
|-
|{{center|3}}
| [[Angela White]]
| 2018, 2019, 2020
|-
| rowspan=1 style="text-align:center;" | 2
| [[Tori Black]]
| 2010, 2011
|-
|}

{{col-2}}

===Three or more nominations===
{| class="wikitable sortable"
|-
! scope="col" width="55"     | Nominations
! scope="col" align="center" | Performer
! scope="col" width="150"     | Years
|-
|rowspan="1" style="text-align:center;" | 9
| [[Angela White]]
| '''2018''', '''2019''', '''2020''', 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, 2026
|-
|rowspan="3" style="text-align:center;" | 7
| [[Riley Reid]] 
| 2014, 2015, '''2016''', 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020
|-
| [[Adriana Chechik]]
| 2015, 2016, '''2017''', 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021
|-
| [[Kira Noir]]
| 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, '''2023''', 2024, 2025
|-
|rowspan="7" style="text-align:center;" | 5
| [[Serenity (actress)|Serenity]]
| 1998, 1999, 2000, 2001, 2002
|-
| [[Belladonna (actress)|Belladonna]]
| 2003, 2004, 2007, 2009, 2010
|-
| [[Jenna Haze]]
| 2007, 2008, '''2009''', 2010, 2011
|-
| [[Bobbi Starr]]
| 2009, 2010, 2011, '''2012''', 2013
|-
| [[Kayden Kross]]
| 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013
|-
| [[Abella Danger]]
| 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021
|-
| [[Vanna Bardot]]
| 2022, 2023, '''2024''', 2025, 2026
|-
| rowspan="15" style="text-align:center;" | 4
| Chloe
| 1998, '''1999''', 2000, 2002
|-
| [[Jewel De'Nyle]]
| '''2001''', 2002, 2003, 2004
|-
| [[Jesse Jane]]
| 2008, 2009, 2010, 2012
|-
| [[Alexis Texas]]
| 2009, 2011, 2012, 2013
|-
| Lexi Belle
| 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013
|-
| Kristina Rose
| 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013
|-
| [[Dana DeArmond]]
| 2010, 2012, 2013, 2014
|-
| [[Asa Akira]]
| 2011, 2012, '''2013''', 2014
|-
| [[Chanel Preston]]
| 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015
|-
| Anikka Albrite
| 2014, '''2015''', 2016, 2017
|-
| Jane Wilde
| 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023
|-
| [[Ana Foxxx]]
| 2020, 2021, 2023, 2024
|-
| [[Anna Claire Clouds]]
| 2023, 2024, '''2025''', 2026
|-
| Lilly Bell
| 2023, 2024, 2025, 2026
|-
| Blake Blossom
| 2023, 2024, 2025, 2026
|-
| rowspan="31" style="text-align:center;" | 3
| [[Ashlyn Gere]]
| '''1993''', 1994, 1995
|-
| [[Tiffany Mynx]]
| 1994, 1998, 1999
|-
| [[Jill Kelly (actress)|Jill Kelly]]
| 1997, 1998, 1999
|-
| [[Sydnee Steele]]
| 2001, 2002, 2003
|-
| Monique
| 2000, 2002, 2004
|-
| Bridgette Kerkove
| 2001, 2002, 2004
|-
| Taylor Rain
| 2004, 2005, 2006
|-
| [[Savanna Samson]]
| 2004, 2005, 2008
|-
| Jada Fire
| 2006, 2007, 2008
|-
| [[Jessica Drake]]
| 2003, 2005, 2009
|-
| [[Sunny Lane]]
| 2007, 2008, 2009
|-
| [[Kimberly Kane]]
| 2007, 2011, 2012
|-
| [[Misty Stone]]
| 2010, 2011, 2013
|-
| Andy San Dimas
| 2011, 2012, 2013
|-
| Allie Haze
| 2012, 2013, 2014
|-
| [[Skin Diamond]]
| 2013, 2014, 2015
|-
| Jada Stevens
| 2013, 2014, 2015
|-
| Dani Daniels
| 2014, 2015, 2016
|-
| Maddy O'Reilly
| 2014, 2015, 2016
|-
| A.J. Applegate
| 2015, 2016, 2017
|-
| [[August Ames]]
| 2016, 2017, 2018
|-
| Aidra Fox
| 2016, 2017, 2018
|-
| Keisha Grey
| 2016, 2017, 2018
|-
| Katrina Jade
| 2017, 2018, 2019
|-
| [[Emily Willis]]
| 2020, '''2021''', 2022
|-
| Kenzie Reeves
| 2020, 2021, 2022
|-
| [[Gianna Dior]]
| 2021, '''2022''', 2023
|-
| Kenna James
| 2021, 2022, 2023
|-
| Alexis Tae
| 2022, 2023, 2024
|-
| [[Jennifer White (pornographic film actress)|Jennifer White]]
| 2024, 2025, '''2026'''
|-
| Liz Jordan
| 2024, 2025, 2026
|-
|rowspan=14 |2026<ref>{{Cite web|title=2026 AVN Award Nominees Announced|url=https://avn.com/awards/2026_nominees|website=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|title=2026 AVN Award Winners Announced|url=https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971|website=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>
|rowspan=14 align=center|
|rowspan=14 align=center|'''[[Jennifer White (pornographic film actress)|Jennifer White]]'''
|align=center|Chloe Amour
|-
|align=center|[[Vanna Bardot]]
|-
|align=center|Lilly Bell
|-
|align=center|Blake Blossom
|-
|align=center|Chanel Camryn
|-
|align=center|[[Anna Claire Clouds]]
|-
|align=center|Liz Jordan
|-
|align=center|Cherry Kiss
|-
|align=center|Nicole Kitt
|-
|align=center|Rissa May
|-
|align=center|[[Octavia Red]]
|-
|align=center|Gal Ritchie
|-
|align=center|[[Kylie Rocket]]
|-
|align=center|Angela White
|}

{{col-end}}

==See also==
* [[AVN Award for Best Actress]]
* [[AVN Award for Best Supporting Actress]]
* [[AVN Award for Female Foreign Performer of the Year]]
* [[AVN Award for Transsexual Performer of the Year]]
* [[AVN Award for Male Performer of the Year]]
* [[AVN Award for Male Foreign Performer of the Year]]
* [[AVN Award for Best Actor]]
* [[AVN Award for Best Supporting Actor]]

==References==
{{Reflist|3|refs=
<ref name="ashlyngere">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/ashlyn-gere-98/ |title=Ashlyn Gere|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="debidiamond">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/debi-diamond-207/ |title=Debi Diamond|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="asiacarrera">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/asia-carrera-8/ |title=Asia Carrera|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="kaitlynashley">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/kaitlyn-ashley-39/ |title=Kaitlyn Ashley|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="missy">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/missy-55/ |title=Missy|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="stephanieswift">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/stephanie-swift-85/ |title=Stephanie Swift|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="chloe">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/chloe-124/ |title=Chloe|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="inarivachs">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/inari-vachs-127/ |title=Inari Vachs|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="jeweldenyle">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/jewel-de%27-nyle-1753/ |title=Jewel De'Nyle|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="nikitadenise">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/nikita-denise-23409/ |title=Nikita Denise|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="aurorasnow">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/aurora-snow-23608/ |title=Aurora Snow|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="ashleyblue">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/ashley-blue-26652/ |title=Ashley Blue|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="laurenphoenix">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/lauren-phoenix-30068/ |title=Lauren Phoenix|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="audreyhollander">{{cite web|url=http://www.adultfilmdatabase.com/actor/audrey-hollander-31345/ |title=Audrey Hollander|publisher=adultfilmdatabase.com|access-date=August 4, 2014}}</ref>
<ref name="avnnoms2000">{{cite web|url=http://www.avn.com/awards/noms.html |title=AVN Awards|date=January 8, 2000|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20000302100333/http://www.avn.com/awards/noms.html |archive-date=March 2, 2000 }}</ref>
<ref name="avnnoms2001">{{cite web|url=http://www.avnawards.com/nominees.html |title=AVN Award Nominees|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20010309213908/http://www.avnawards.com/nominees.html |archive-date=March 9, 2001 }}</ref>
<ref name="avnnoms2002">{{cite web|url=http://www.avnawards.com/nomin-list.html |title=AVN Award Nominees|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20011208103701/http://www.avnawards.com/nomin-list.html |archive-date=December 8, 2001 }}</ref>
<ref name="avnnoms2003">{{cite web|url=http://www.avnawards.com/nominees.shtml |title=AVN Award Nominees|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20021127014135/http://www.avnawards.com/nominees.shtml |archive-date=November 27, 2002 }}</ref>
<ref name="avnnoms2004">{{cite web|url=http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/05/58/32/55832Nominations.pdf |title=AVN Award Nominees|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20031203023916/http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/05/58/32/55832Nominations.pdf |archive-date=December 3, 2003 }}</ref>
<ref name="avnnoms2005">{{cite web|url=http://www.avnawards.com/2005nominees_fr.shtml |title=2005 AVN Award Nominees|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20041114124447/http://www.avnawards.com/2005nominees_fr.shtml |archive-date=November 14, 2004 }}</ref>
<ref name="avnnoms2006">{{cite web|url=http://www.avnawards.com/2006nominations.pdf |title=2006 AVN Award Nominees|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20051126013107/http://www.avnawards.com/2006nominations.pdf |archive-date=November 26, 2005 }}</ref>
}}

==External links==
* {{official website|http://www.avnawards.com}}

{{AVN}}
{{AVN Female}}

[[Category:AVN Awards|Female Performer of the Year]]
[[Category:Awards established in 1993]]
[[Category:Awards for actresses]]
